bead.title: agent: ExecuteBeadLoopRuntime struct + RunWithConfig method (alongside Run)
bead.description:
Stage 1 of SD-024. Adds ExecuteBeadLoopRuntime (durable fields stripped) and (*ExecuteBeadWorker).RunWithConfig(ctx, rcfg, runtime) alongside the existing Run(opts) method. New method delegates to existing implementation under the hood; no behavior change yet. Old Run + ExecuteBeadLoopOptions stay green.

In-scope:
- cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop.go (add new types + method)
- cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop_runwithconfig_test.go (new) — unit test that RunWithConfig delegates correctly given test-config-resolved input

Out-of-scope:
- Migrating any production caller (beads 7-9)
- Migrating any test caller (beads 11a-15b)
- Retiring Run / ExecuteBeadLoopOptions (bead 16)

See TD-024 §Runtime structs and §Bead 6.
bead.acceptance: cd cli && go build ./internal/agent/... passes. cd cli && go test -run TestRunWithConfigDelegation ./internal/agent/... passes: builds a *Config via config.NewTestConfigForLoop, calls Resolve, calls RunWithConfig with a deterministic runtime, asserts the loop's observable behavior matches the configured values. cd cli && go test ./... passes — old Run path still green.
